ValidationRule.description: Check to ensure that Training Conducted Date is not be a future date.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( NOT($Permission.Bypass_Validation_Rules), OR( RecordType.DeveloperName = 'Live_Training', RecordType.DeveloperName = 'E_Learning' ), Training_Conducted_Date__c > TODAY() )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Training Conducted Date must not be a future date.
